content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative self-improvement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of no extra training or supervision while boosting refinement quality. This hybrid approach mimics how humans deliberately draw on contradictory internal perspectives when refining their own work, rather than only incrementally polishing a single initial line of thinking.
